'''Ka'Pa's Palace''' was the headquarters of [[Ka'Pa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] crime organization. During [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], sent on behalf of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to negotiate a supply deal, [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] arrived at the palace, but was not allowed to enter it. After fighting through aggressive [[Grave Tuskens|Grave Tusken]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], Jade found Tusken clothing and managed to fool the [[TT-8L gatekeeper droid/Legends|TT-8L gatekeeper droid]] that guarded the gate into allowing her access into the palace. While the majority of the palace denizens ignored Jade, a number tried to attack her. She killed them, and eventually found an audience with Ka'Pa.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' {{1st}}
